## How it was tested

<!-- Check what applies and add anything manual. -->

- [ ] `cargo test` / `cargo check` (Rust, if touched)
- [ ] `bun run typecheck && bunx vitest run` in `web/` (frontend, if touched)
- [ ] Exercised manually in `cargo tauri dev`
